content.en:
Looking at this half-cut knife, Ye Tian reached out and touched it.

When Ye Tian came into contact with this half-cut knife, countless pictures emerged into Ye Tian's soul, presenting everything about the past of this knife in Ye Tian's consciousness.

"Blue and Red Knife!"

This is a high-grade artifact, it is the blade of a great god-level powerhouse, after 50,000 years of conquest, it was finally broken in half, collected by the Wuji Sword Sect, and put into the knife mound.

Now, Ye Tian felt the essence of this blue and red knife, as well as its emotions, will, and even realized the knife skills that had been used on it.

Little by little, three hours passed.

Ye Tian let go of the half-cut knife and shook his head.

This time the gain is not big, mainly because the experience of this knife is average, and the level of contact is relatively low, so it is of little use to him, but it is also a little helpful.

At this time, this half-cutter has lost its light and is no longer useful, so it can only wait for the long years to evolve again.

Ye Tian left here and continued to look for other knives.

There are a lot of knives in the knife mound, but after all, many times have been opened, and many knives have become very ordinary and useless.

In the blink of an eye, five days have passed.

In these five days, Ye Tian encountered a total of six useful knife weapons, and with the help of these six knife weapons, he had a deeper understanding of the essence of the knife, but it was far from reaching the level of transformation.

"I'm on the periphery of the knife mound now, far from the core area, and the closer the kenza is to the core area, the better the essence of the knife is, and the more useful knives there are. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, it is more dangerous to go deep into the knife mound, because of the sword aura that permeates the air.

These sword qi are like oxygen, constantly drilling into the human body, but oxygen is not offensive to the human body, but the knife qi is aggressive, if it is a weak god level, it can't withstand the impact of ordinary knife qi at all, and the flesh is directly shattered and killed.

But Ye Tian was very confident in himself.

Ye Tian's physical body can far surpass other powerhouses above the god level, although the immortal power is not as good as some true gods and great god levels, but the endurance of his body exceeds that of many powerhouses above the god level, because he is more likely to withstand the impact of the sword mound's sword qi.

"Forward!"

Ye Tian flew towards the depths of the knife mound, preparing to enter the inner perimeter of the knife mound, looking for a good quality knife weapon.

As soon as he entered the inner enclosure of the knife mound, Ye Tian found a superb artifact black knife, although this superb artifact was full of cracks, as if it was about to shatter, it was still well preserved.

To be able to make such a crack in a superb artifact must have experienced a tragic battle.

Most of the body of this superb artifact black knife was covered with soil and stuck straight into the ground.

Ye Tian stepped forward and held the handle of this superb artifact long knife, feeling the life experience of this long knife and the essence of the knife.

Gradually, Ye Tian was immersed in his feelings.

And just like that, the day passed.

"It turned out to be a galaxy-level powerful saber, fighting for millions of years, and it is also an era when human beings are under the oppression of all races and have not yet become a great race of the universe.

Ye Tian took a deep breath and had a deeper understanding of the Dao of the Dao.

Letting go of his hand, Ye Tian continued to look for other knives.

As time passed, Ye Tian found more and more knife tools in the inner perimeter of the knife mound, and he had more and more insights into the essence of the knife.

This kind of assistance is more direct help than his own retreat and penance cultivation and comprehension of the Dao Dao, and it can make Ye Tian's Dao foundation more directly improved.

Ye Tian had already made it clear how to improve his Dao Peer Sect, but his background was insufficient, which made it difficult for him to raise the Dao Peerless Tianyue Knife to the pinnacle-level Blade Peerless Sect Peer Sect.

It's like a thing, you know how to do it, but if you don't have experience, you will definitely not be proficient in doing it for the first time, which is the gap between experience and heritage.

The time that Ye Tian spent in the knife mound was not infinite, otherwise the next time the knife mound was opened, how would others find useful knives.

He can only stay in the sword mound for three months, and once he exceeds three months, he will be ostracized by the sword mound.

Now, Ye Tian has been in the knife mound for more than a month, and there is not much time left.

"Must enter the core area!"

Ye Tian decided.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew quickly and headed to the core area.

As soon as he entered the core area, a terrifying sword aura surged.

In an instant, Ye Tian's body was in great pain, as if he was about to be cut by a thousand knives.

"The sword qi in the core area is really terrifying, I'm afraid that even if a great god-level powerhouse is here, he can't rely on divine power to protect his body. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Fortunately, his physical strength is strong enough, and with the immortal power to protect his body, he can barely walk in the core area, but he can't really get close to the core area.

But in the core area, Ye Tian didn't dare to fly too fast, most of the strength had to protect himself, otherwise he really couldn't withstand the impact of the sword qi.

Time passed day by day, and it was ten days in the blink of an eye.

this day.

Ye Tian saw a knife that exuded a strong light and an illusory influence, no, it should be called the tip of the knife.

The tip of the knife floated in mid-air, exuding a powerful aura.

"Origin Artifact!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

He has a Origin Artifact-level defensive armor, so he knows more about Origin Artifact.

Although there is only one tip left of this Origin Artifact, its value is still immeasurable.

However, the things here can't be taken away, Ye Tian doesn't have any covetousness for the origin artifact, but the life of this origin artifact has been of great help to Ye Tian, and it is definitely worth the essence of the knife of dozens of superb artifacts.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over and touched the tip of this origin artifact.

Rumble!!!!

Countless pictures emerged, and Ye Tian instantly fell into the understanding of the essence of the knife and the life experience of this knife.

Countless battles, countless fights!

The perception of countless sword skills, the essence of countless sword paths!

Ye Tian seemed to have fallen into an epiphany, and he hadn't woken up from the essence of the knife for a long time.

And just like that, day by day.

In the blink of an eye, half a moon passed, and the tip of this Origin Artifact completely lost its light, turned into ordinary Origin Artifact fragments, and fell to the ground.

And Ye Tian slowly opened his eyes, and at that moment, his eyes seemed to present a world of swords.

"It turned out to be a cosmic god's sword, but it's a pity that that cosmic god was killed by the enemy along with this knife, and even the origin artifact knife was shattered!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But I have to say that the tip of this origin artifact helped him much more than the best artifact, even more than the sum of the previous accumulations.

"There's still a little time left, I hope I can find a second Origin Artifact-level knife weapon!"

Ye Tian continued to search, this time he was lucky, only one day had passed, and he successfully found the second Origin Artifact-level knife weapon.

There was only one handle left in this knife, but it was still part of the Origin artifact.

With the help of this origin artifact, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the essence of the knife and accumulate the foundation.

......

"It's been three months, His Highness Wanfa should be coming out!"

The Dark Lord muttered as he stood at the foot of the Knife Mountain at the entrance to the Sword Shrine.

On the side, the Blood Jade Lord was also waiting.

After all, this is the place where the sect of the Infinite Sword Sect is located, and he naturally doesn't worry that the Dark Lord is here, if the Dark Lord does something, he will have a great responsibility.

Although this possibility is relatively small, the Blood Jade Juggernaut is not willing to take risks.

Rumble!!!!

The knife mountain cracks, and the entrance to the knife mound opens.

A figure was sent out with the light, and this person was Ye Tian.

"Your Highness, it's time for us to leave!"

The Lord of Darkness said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian looked at the Dark Lord and nodded slightly.

Then, Ye Tian said goodbye to the Blood Jade Lord and left the Infinite Sword Sect with the Dark Master.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to return to the Terran Supreme Hall Xuan-level area.

Not long after he came back, Ye Tian entered a complete retreat.

He wants to sort out and understand all the gains in the sword mound this time, and then work hard to create a pinnacle-level sword path mastery.

Three years later.

On this day, a supreme sword aura suddenly came out of Ye Tian's cultivation room.

Although the Dark Lord was not cultivating in Ye Tian's cultivation tower, he had been paying attention to Ye Tian's situation.

"This breath ......"

The Dark Lord noticed it, and was slightly surprised.

"Such a fast speed, His Highness Wanfa's talent is really against the sky, and he has created a pinnacle-level sword path peerless skill so quickly, if you look at it this way, His Highness's strength should have stepped into the supreme level!" thought to himself.

He didn't report this news to the Supremes, not only because it was unnecessary, but more importantly, he was now Ye Tian's guard and didn't need to do anything else.

Cultivation Tower.

Ye Tian had just created a pinnacle-level sword path mastery, and he immediately entered the Illusory World Battle Tower.

He wanted to test his strength and whether he had really reached the combat power of His Royal Highness the Supreme Level.

War Tower, 10th floor.

A replica of His Royal Highness appeared.

Last time, Ye Tian faced this copy of His Royal Highness, and he was defeated within a few moves.

But this time, Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

At the beginning, Ye Tian opened all his defensive means, and also used the Spatial Divine Power Ten Thousand Realms.

Then, time stasis was cast, affecting the clone of this Supreme Highness.

At last.

"Sky Moon Knife!

The pinnacle-level sword path mastery burst out and turned into an astonishing sword, as if breaking through time and space, slashing towards the copy of this Supreme Highness.

Boom!!

The clone of this Supreme Highness was knocked away with a single blow.

Thundered!!!

At the beginning of the fierce battle, Ye Tian kept fighting, although it was difficult to hurt the clone of this Supreme Highness, but he could fight head-on.

In the midst of such a fight, an hour passed.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian left the battle tower, which meant that he had broken through the tenth layer and had the combat power of His Royal Highness of the Supreme Level.

"Breaking through the tenth layer, although it is relatively reluctant, it is by delaying time, not defeating the opponent, but it can be regarded as the weakest god-level supreme-level highness!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The combat power returned to the supreme level, Ye Tian was in a good mood, but he wanted to impact the true god level.

He can continue to improve at the god level now, and there is no need to rush to the true god level.

He is now taking the road of rebellion, the god-level impact on the true god-level needs to face six thunder tribulations, each of which is extremely terrifying, even if he is a newcomer to the combat power of the Supreme Highness, it may not be safe, so Ye Tian must ensure that his strength is incomparably against the genius.
